log: === INITIATIVE ===
Human — Bardic Musician: 18 (d20:16 + 2)
Young Red Dragon: 10 (d20:10 + 0)
=== ROUND 1 ===
--- Human — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Human — Bardic Musician casts Polymorph (4th level)
→ Human — Bardic Musician polymorphs into a Giant Ape! (157 HP, AC 12, multiattack: 2)
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon descends and moves from (8,0) to (0,0) [40ft].
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 12] HIT! 24 damage. Human — Bardic Musician HP: 133/157
→ Human — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Polymorph
→ Human — Bardic Musician reverts from Polymorph to original form (HP: 67/67)
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Human — Bardic Musician HP: 52/67
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Human — Bardic Musician HP: 35/67
⚡ Human — Bardic Musician casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:12 total 22 vs AC 12 — still hits.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Human — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Human — Bardic Musician casts Polymorph (4th level)
→ Human — Bardic Musician polymorphs into a Giant Ape! (157 HP, AC 12, multiattack: 2)
Bonus action error: Invalid choice: Option not available: bonus-1
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 12] HIT! 18 damage. Human — Bardic Musician HP: 139/157
→ Concentration save: [10 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 12] HIT! 13 damage. Human — Bardic Musician HP: 126/157
→ Human — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Polymorph
→ Human — Bardic Musician reverts from Polymorph to original form (HP: 35/67)
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Human — Bardic Musician HP: 17/67
⚡ Human — Bardic Musician casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:17 total 27 vs AC 12 — still hits.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Human — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Human — Bardic Musician casts Dissonant Whispers (1st level)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 14 damage.
→ Young Red Dragon gains: must_use_reaction_to_move_away
Human — Bardic Musician casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Human — Bardic Musician for 6. HP: 23/67
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 23 damage. Human — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
